Thought leadershipJune 18, 2026
Jesse Hendon - Group Expert
What does another agency know about yours that scares them?
"Right now, somewhere in your market, another agency is planning their AEP. They want your members. They want your renewals. What do they know about your agency that scares them and what do they know that doesn't?"
98 reach - 3 reactions - 8 comments
Member responses
Juni Hsieh
"100% referrals, I know everyone of my clients personally, they all have my cellphone number, I'm a text away 24/7. Old fashion agents are rare now, people appreciate the extra miles of service then just Insurance."
Lori Canady
"My service and referrals from my loyal client base and healthcare providers who trust me and know I put my clients first."
The theme from the thread
Agents who win AEP have already won the relationship. Referrals, personal service, and trust built year-round are what competitors can't replicate.
Referrals Retention AEP prep
